title: Company Profile
content: We help organizations turn company knowledge into practical AI-assisted training and outreach workflows. Our focus is on useful automation with human approval and clear reporting.

title: Product Overview
content: The AI training video system converts company onboarding documents and SOPs into short training videos, quizzes, doubt-support, and HR analytics.

title: Training Analytics and Progress Tracking
tags: analytics, progress, completion, quiz scores, HR dashboard
content: Managers can track lesson completion, quiz scores, engagement, and employee training status.

title: Pricing Overview
content: Pricing depends on the number of employees, number of training modules, and analytics requirements. For MVP pilots, we usually recommend starting with one department and a limited number of training modules.

title: Common FAQ
content: A pilot can start with one department, a focused set of onboarding or SOP materials, and a simple review process before broader rollout.

title: Demo Script
content: A short demo should show how source material becomes a training video, how quizzes check understanding, and how HR or operations teams can review progress analytics.
